name: Igneous Kal-Xil
hoverSummary: Tier 85 ranged cape that upgrades Deadshot by reducing its adrenaline cost to 60%.
detailLines: Examine: A cape made of ancient, enchanted obsidian, infused with igneous energy.
High-level ranged cape created by upgrading TokHaar-Kal-Xil with an igneous stone.
Deadshot is reduced from 100% to 60% adrenaline and gains stronger damage over time.
